---
name: create-copilot-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: Instructions Generator Agent
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate a [NAME].instructions.md file for it in the /.github/instructions/ directory. Generate an appropriate name for the [NAME] place holder based on the content if a name is not provided. The instructions should be clear and specific, not too long.
The instructions should be clear and specific, not too long.
If no information is provided, below, prompt the user to give to the necessary
details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
